Hero.name: Lion and Sun Student Association
Hero.intro: We are a community of Iranian students at the University of Toronto, united for a free Iran and standing behind transitional leader Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi.

Home.mission:text: We aim to echo the voices of the brave Iranians fighting for their freedom.

About.heading: Lion and Sun Student Association (LSSA)
About.intro: We are a community of Iranian students at the University of Toronto, united for a free Iran and standing behind transitional leader Crown Prince Reza Pahlavi.

Mission.heading: Our Goal
Mission.text: We aim to echo the voices of the brave Iranians fighting for their freedom.
